---
title: "IBS"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = FALSE,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	autodep = TRUE,
	cache = TRUE,
	cache.comments = FALSE,
	tidy = TRUE,
	tidy.opts = list(comment = FALSE)
)

library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)

library(cluster)
library(VarSelLCM)
library(pheatmap)
library(tibble)

library(clusterSim)
```

```{r}
ema_0 <- read.csv("../EMA_B1_SURA.csv")
wide_assign <- read.csv("../wide_assign.csv")
```

```{r data_cleaning}
cat_vars <- c("Gender_Final", "Substance_use", "Stress_tech",
              "Sex", "Race", "IBS_type", "Colectomy", "Descent",
              "Marital_status", "Education", "Income_self", "Health_issues")

wide_assign.cleaned <- wide_assign %>%
  dplyr::select(-Condition, -SSS_Sum_T2_Recode, 
                -SSS_Sum_T3_Recode, -TE_Credibility_T1, -TE_Expectancy_T1) %>%
  na.omit() %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(all_of(cat_vars), factor)
  )

input_wide <- wide_assign.cleaned %>%
  dplyr::select(-PID)

ema <- ema_0 %>% 
  group_by(PID) %>%
  filter(n() >= 11) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(-time, -Timeofday_f, -Weekday_Weekend)

avg_ema <- ema %>%
  group_by(PID) %>% 
  summarize(
    across(where(is.numeric), list(
      mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd   = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
    ), .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"),
    
    across(where(is.character), ~first(.x)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

merged_data <- wide_assign.cleaned %>% 
  inner_join(avg_ema, by = "PID")

input_merged <- merged_data %>%
  dplyr::select(-PID)


num_vars.wide <- setdiff(names(input_wide), cat_vars)
wide_scaled <- input_wide
wide_scaled[num_vars.wide] <- scale(input_wide[num_vars.wide])

num_vars.merged <- setdiff(names(input_merged), cat_vars)
merge_scaled <- input_merged
merge_scaled[num_vars.merged] <- scale(input_merged[num_vars.merged])
```

```{r helper_functions}
run_lcm <- function(data, name) {
  model <- VarSelCluster(x = data, gvals = 1:6)
  
  rel_vars <- model@model@names.relevant
  clusters <- model@partitions@zMAP
  
  clustered_data <- data %>%
    mutate(cluster = factor(clusters))
  
  rel_vars_num <- intersect(
    rel_vars,
    names(clustered_data)[sapply(clustered_data, is.numeric)]
  )
  
  profiles <- clustered_data %>%
    group_by(cluster) %>%
    summarise(
      across(all_of(rel_vars_num), ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))
    )
  
  mat <- profiles %>%
    column_to_rownames("cluster") %>%
    as.matrix()
  
  pheatmap(t(mat), 
           cluster_rows = TRUE, 
           cluster_cols = TRUE, 
           main = paste("IBS Phynotype for Normalized", name, "data"))
  
  return (list(
    model = model,
    rel_vars = rel_vars,
    clusters = clusters,
    clustered_data = clustered_data,
    profiles = profiles
  ))
}

dist_across_clusters <- function(model) {
  clustered_data <- model$clustered_data
  ibs_dist <- clustered_data %>%
    group_by(cluster, IBS_type) %>%
    summarise(
      n = n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    group_by(cluster) %>%
    mutate(
      proportion = n / sum(n)
    )
  
  ggplot(ibs_dist,
    aes(
      x = cluster,
      y = proportion,
      fill = IBS_type
    )
  ) +
    geom_bar(
      stat = "identity",
      position = "dodge"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "IBS Type Distribution Across VarSelCluster Clusters",
      x = "Cluster",
      y = "Proportion"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}

ibs_types_dist <- function(input_dat, model) {
  merged_cluster <- input_dat %>%
    mutate(
      cluster = factor(model$clusters),
      IBS_type = factor(
        IBS_type,
        levels = c(1, 2, 3),
        labels = c("IBS-C", "IBS-D", "IBS-M")
      )
    )
  d <- list(merged_cluster$cluster, merged_cluster$IBS_type)
  
    cluster_vars_num <- model$rel_vars[
      sapply(merged_cluster[model$rel_vars], is.numeric)
    ]
  
  ibs_dist <- merged_cluster %>%
    group_by(cluster) %>%
    summarise(
      n = n(),
      across(all_of(cluster_vars_num), ~ round(mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 2)),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  ibs_dist_long <- ibs_dist %>%
    dplyr::select(-n) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = -cluster,
      names_to = "Variable",
      values_to = "Mean"
    ) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = cluster,
      values_from = Mean,
      names_prefix = "Cluster_"
    )
  
  return(list(tab1 = ibs_dist_long, tab2 = d, graph = dist_across_clusters(model)))
}


plot_feature_dist <- function(input_dat, model) {
  clustered_original <- input_dat %>%
    mutate(
      cluster = factor(model$clusters),
      IBS_type = factor(
        IBS_type,
        levels = c(1, 2, 3),
        labels = c("IBS-C", "IBS-D", "IBS-M")
      )
    )

  rel_vars <- model$rel_vars

  rel_vars_num <- intersect(
    rel_vars,
    names(clustered_original)[sapply(clustered_original, is.numeric)]
  )

  for (var in rel_vars_num) {

    plot_data <- clustered_original %>%
      dplyr::select(cluster, IBS_type, all_of(var)) %>%
      rename(value = all_of(var))

    p <- ggplot(
      plot_data,
      aes(
        x = value,
        color = cluster,
        fill = cluster
      )
    ) +
      geom_density(alpha = 0.25) +
      facet_wrap(~ IBS_type) +
      labs(
        title = paste(
          "Distribution of", var,
          "Across Clusters Within Each IBS Type"
        ),
        x = paste(var, "(Original Scale)"),
        y = "Density",
        color = "Cluster",
        fill = "Cluster"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()

    print(p)
  }
}
```

```{r}
model.w <- run_lcm(wide_scaled, "wide_assign")
```

```{r}
dist_across_clusters(model.w)
res.w <- ibs_types_dist(input_wide, model.w)
res.w$tab1
table(res.w$tab2)
res.w$graph
```

```{r}
plot_feature_dist(input_wide, model.w)
```


```{r}
model.m <- run_lcm(merge_scaled, "wide_assign + ema")
```

```{r}
res <- ibs_types_dist(input_merged, model.m)
table(res$tab2)
res$tab1
res$graph
```


```{r}
plot_feature_dist(input_merged, model.m)
```
